use_cases: Display currently playing track with album artwork, song title, and artist information
Interactive music player with play/pause, skip controls, and progress bar seeking
Volume control with drag-to-adjust functionality and mute toggle
Song interaction features including liking tracks and accessing context menus
Real-time playback progress animation with drag-to-seek capability
ai_summary: A feature-rich Spotify-style music player card component that displays album art, track metadata, and provides full playback controls including play/pause, skip, volume adjustment, and progress seeking. Built with React state management using drag-based interactions for volume and progress bars, hover animations, and a context menu for additional song options. Features include like functionality, mute toggle, and multi-song playlist support with dynamic current track indexing.
